conjecture_statement: {'conjecture_generator': ConjectureResult(conjectures=[Conjecture(statement='Let $K_0(x)$ and $I_0(x)$ be the modified Bessel functions of the second and first kind of order zero, respectively. The following identity holds: $$\\int_0^\\infty x I_0(x) K_0(x)^5 \\,dx = \\frac{4}{25} \\int_0^\\infty x K_0(x)^5 \\,dx$$', natural_language="This conjecture proposes a precise, simple rational relationship between two highly non-trivial integrals involving powers of the modified Bessel function $K_0(x)$
